hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css) npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'brew install'; then brew update && brew bundle dump --file=~/.config/brew/Brewfile --force && echo 'Brewfile updated!'; fi 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"' 2>/dev/null || true
